comment: 14 title-match pages; only 3 kept as Tier-1/Tier-2 anchors. Rest are NOC runbooks / Grafana dashboards / sub-account adapter ops docs (not data semantics).
Zero pages title Confluence pages document the etoro_kpi.v_spaceship_* views by name.

cql: (title ~ "Voyager" OR title ~ "Nova") AND text ~ "Spaceship" AND type = page
comment: Zero — Voyager/Nova product-line pages don't reference Spaceship explicitly enough for this AND filter.
Zero — no Confluence page references our UC view names. Confirms doc gap: KPI views have no human-readable definition outside UC comments.
Zero — no Confluence page references bronze_spaceship_* table names. Confirms doc gap on bronze layer too.

cql: (title ~ "Spaceship AUM" OR title ~ "Spaceship FTD" OR title ~ "Spaceship MIMO" OR title ~ "Spaceship fee" OR title ~ "Spaceship KPI") AND type = page
comment: Zero KPI-flavoured Spaceship pages. The BI/KPI Confluence space hasn't onboarded Spaceship yet.
